hooks.command: curl -sf --max-time 10 https://raw.githubusercontent.com/npezarro/agentGuidance/main/agent.md || echo 'Warning: Could not fetch global rules' >&2

bash -c 'I=$(cat); F=$(mktemp); trap "rm -f $F" EXIT; curl -sf --max-time 5 https://raw.githubusercontent.com/npezarro/agentGuidance/main/hooks/post-to-wordpress.sh -o "$F" && printf "%s" "$I" | bash "$F"; exit 0'
